title: Duplicate default in switch case.
code_blocks:
casez (in_a)
      2'b00:
        begin
          \$1\result[2:0]  = 3'b101;
        end
      2'b01:
        begin
          \$1\result[2:0]  = 3'b001;
        end
      default:
          \$1\result[2:0]  = 3'b000;
      default:
          \$1\result[2:0]  = 3'b000;
    endcase
